summary: The conversation is about booking a hotel room at Darshan Grand Hotel. Speaker 0 inquires about room availability for their family, and Speaker 1 provides information about the available rooms and their rates. They discuss the room capacity, rates, and breakfast options. Speaker 0 asks for the total cost, and Speaker 1 provides the final rate with breakfast. The conversation ends with Speaker 0 saying they will talk to Speaker 1 in two minutes to finalize the booking.

key_discussion_points.details: Speaker 1 has only two family rooms available, with one double bed and one single bed in each room. An extra mattress can be installed in the room if needed.
The room rate is ₹5500 per night with taxes, and ₹6000 per night with breakfast.
One room can accommodate 5 people, with two beds (one double and one single). Another room option has two double beds, but its rate is higher.
Breakfast is available at an additional cost of ₹250 per person, excluding the 4-year-old daughter.

action_items.task: Send the hotel location to Speaker 0

follow_up: Speaker 0 will talk to Speaker 1 in 2 minutes to finalize the booking
